description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty hammer with a large, rectangular metallic head featuring gold accents and intricate geometric engravings on its sides. The head has a flat striking face on one end and a tapered, chisel-like point on the opposite end, suggesting it is designed for both impact and precision work. The handle is cylindrical, made of dark wood with a visible grain pattern, and is capped with a metallic pommel at the base for balance and durability. The handle also features gold bands at the top and bottom, adding both structural reinforcement and decorative flair. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or specialized tool, with a blend of utilitarian and ornamental elements. The surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A heavy, ornate hammer with a gold-accented, engraved metal head and a dark wooden handle, featuring both a flat and a pointed striking end. The design is both functional and decorative, with no visible wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved metal head with gold accents and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat striking face and the circular pommel at the base of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chisel-like pointed end of the head and the detailed engravings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the gold-accented back of the hammer head and the handle's alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a cylindrical shape, visible wood grain, and gold metallic bands at both ends for reinforcement; the surface appears smooth with no additional grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledge-type head with a flat striking face on one end and a tapered, chisel-like point on the other; features gold accents and geometric engravings on the sides.
